title: phegopteris platyphylla
intro: Phegopteris platyphylla, also known as the Chinese leathery fern or leathery fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Phegopteris platyphylla include reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving blood circulation, as well as acting as a diuretic to help with urinary issues. Phegopteris platyphylla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
